description: A driver has to pay a 'lumper' (third-party service) to unload their trailer at a receiving facility. The driver needs to be reimbursed.

nodes.task_description: The driver pays the lumper service and gets a receipt.

expected_outcome.value: The driver has proof of the expense.

nodes.task_description: The driver uploads a photo of the lumper receipt via their mobile app.

expected_outcome.value: The receipt image is submitted to the system.

nodes.task_description: An agent reviews the receipt, verifies its legitimacy, and approves it as a reimbursable expense.
The lumper fee is added to the driver's next settlement for reimbursement and billed to the customer if applicable.

expected_outcome.value: The reimbursement and customer billing are correctly processed.
